name: Panettone (Italian Fruitcake)
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Mixed dried fruit, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour and salt onto a sheet of wax paper; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, sprinkle yeast over warm water. Stir in 1 teaspoon sugar until dissolved. Let stand until foamy, about 5 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs with remaining sugar until frothy using an electric mixer on medium speed. Add margarine and beat until well combined.
4. Continue beating while adding orange peel and brandy extract.
5. Gradually add the yeast mixture to the flour mixture. Beat at high speed for 5 minutes.
6. Mix in dried fruit until thoroughly combined. Cover with a clean damp towel or plastic wrap and let rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
8. Spray a 3-cup fluted mold with nonstick cooking spray.
9. Punch dough down, then turn into the prepared mold.
10. Bake in the middle of the oven for 10 minutes.
11. Reduce temperature to 325°F (160°C) and bake until the top is browned and the cake pulls away from the mold, about 30 minutes longer. If browning too quickly, cover with foil.
12. Unmold onto a wire rack and let cool.
